title: Petco (WOOF) Q2 Earnings Report Preview
text: Petco (WOOF) Q2 Earnings Report Preview. Key Expectations: Petco is set to report Q2 earnings, with analysts anticipating flat year-on-year revenue at $1.52 billion and an adjusted loss of -$0.03 per share. Recent Performance: In the previous quarter, the pet retailer exceeded revenue projections by 1.1%, reporting $1.53 billion in sales, though this represented a 1.7% decline year-over-year. The company issued optimistic guidance for the following period. Analyst Outlook: The majority of analysts covering the company have reconfirmed their estimates over the last 30 days, suggesting confidence in current projections. However, Petco has missed Wall Street's revenue estimates twice within the past two years. Peer Comparisons: Similar retailers have shown mixed results. National Vision posted 4.6% revenue growth while Leslie's experienced a 6.8% decline, both meeting expectations. Following their reports, National Vision declined 21.7% while Leslie's rose 14.5%. Stock Performance: Petco shares have surged 29.3% over the past month and currently trade at $2.96, approaching an average analyst price target of $3.20, suggesting modest upside potential.
